field_intro.value: I work as a Director of Development at Annertech - Ireland's "Web Agency of the Year". As our strapline goes, we deliver "ambitious, digital experiences". We also win lots of awards for our work. Head on over there to see for yourself.

body.value:
Things about me:

  • I am a Drupal core maintainer for the "Out of the Box" initiative ("Umami Profile").
  • I was Ireland's first Acquia-certified Drupalist. 
  • I work on frontend Drupal development for large (often government) websites in Ireland.
  • My current focus is on Decoupled Drupal websites via Gatsby, and integrating PatternLab with Drupal themes.

Think I can help you? Get in contact!
